title: Shot Diagram Selection and Transform Engine
notes: Shot Diagram Edit Holes mode supports individual and multi-hole selection.
Rows, columns, and every saved hole on the current page can be selected with one action.
Selected holes can be copied, cut, pasted, or shifted one cell in any direction.
Moves and pastes continue across page boundaries and automatically create neighboring pages when needed.
Copy excludes GPS coordinates; cut and shift move GPS tags with the hole and reset only the visual callout position.
Occupied destinations require explicit replacement confirmation, and the last ten edit operations can be undone.
Structured quarry hole conditions and all m38.24 Drill Log improvements remain included.
